_comment: Single source of truth for MCP server configuration.
Edit this file, then run: python3 scripts/render-mcp-configs.py
Commit the manifest edit and regenerated mcp/rendered/ in one commit.
Rendered files contain placeholders like ${N8N_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN}, never real tokens.
Format is plain JSON so the renderer has zero external dependencies — reproducible from a clean clone on any Python 3.x.

n8n-mcp.description: Community n8n-mcp server (rich builder layer on top of the n8n API).
n8n-mcp.notes: Image pinned by digest in docker-compose.yml (commit ba43ec9). See docs/N8N-MCP.md for deployment and smoke-test procedure.

claude-cowork.description: Claude running inside the Cowork desktop app.
claude-cowork.config_hint: Merge the rendered mcpServers block into claude_desktop_config.json inside the MSIX sandbox. Cowork bridges host-side MCP servers into its VM as type='sdk'.

codex.config_hint: Paste the rendered block into the user config file and restart Codex.
